headline: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold FCX Stock After a 20% YTD Rally?
summary: Freeport has surged 20% year to date on copper price gains and strong earnings, but rising costs and weaker volumes cloud its near-term outlook.

raw.headline: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold FCX Stock After a 20% YTD Rally?

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump says Iran can 'be taken out in one night'
summary: Sharpening rhetoric erodes confidence of a breakthrough between Iran and the White House ahead of an 8 p.m. ET deadline.
